headline: CHARTER COMMUNICATIONS NAMES JOHN LEE HEAD OF INTELLIGENCE VENTURES
summary: Charter Communications, Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) today announced the appointment of John Lee as Head of Intelligence Ventures, effective today. Lee will lead a new dedicated team that will focus on advancing intelligence-driven products and partnerships built on the Company's proprietary data signals and AI capabilities in a privacy-safe way. They will be tasked with developing scalable solutions that create differentiated value for marketers, agencies, platforms and enterprises.

headline: 3 Mid-Cap Stocks with Warning Signs
summary: Mid-cap stocks have the best odds of scaling into $100 billion corporations thanks to their tested business models and large addressable markets. But the many opportunities in front of them attract significant competition, spanning from industry behemoths with seemingly infinite resources to small, nimble players with chips on their shoulders.
